target.name: SambaNova Systems
target.founder: Rodrigo Liang, Kunle Olukotun, Christopher Ré

methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series D → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.5x) to $5.0B last post money.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Chips & Semiconductors. Range: $529M - $7.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Semiconductors P/S median is 24.4x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: Tenstorrent
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Series D), post-money $2.7B

data.narrative:
SambaNova Systems is a Series D chip design company that has raised $1.1B to date and carries a current post-money valuation of $5.0B. The valuation analysis draws on a peer universe of 3 public semiconductors comps (ALAB, NVDA, AMD) and 8 private frontier-chip firms, including Tenstorrent, Cerebras, and PsiQuantum.

Two triangulation methods are applicable. Stage-progression analysis applies a 1.5x step-up multiplier typical of Series D advancement, yielding $7.5B. Peer-median anchoring references three same-sector, same/adjacent-stage private comps: Tenstorrent at $2.7B (Series D), PsiQuantum at $7.0B (Series E), and DEEPX at $529M (Series C), producing a median of $2.7B and a range of $529M–$7.0B. Public comp anchoring via P/S multiples (24.4x median across the three semiconductors tickers) cannot be applied absent SambaNova's disclosed revenue.

The triangulated range across both methods spans $2.3B (low) to $8.6B (high), with a median of $5.1B—coinciding with current post-money. This tight clustering around the existing valuation suggests fair pricing relative to peer comps, though meaningful uncertainty persists around stage-progression timing and the wide dispersion within the private peer set ($529M–$7.0B). Revenue disclosure would enable public comp validation.
